channel.name: Bahmni Patient to HIE
channel.description: Increment 2.4 (issue #13), per Gate C (ADR 0005) and ADR 0003. Polls Bahmni's OpenMRS FHIR2 R4 Patient endpoint and conditionally upserts each patient into the HAPI hub keyed on Patient.identifier under the system https://lab.example/identifiers/bahmni-central. Never sets or overwrites HAPI resource ids. Outbound only (Bahmni is read-only to this channel).
channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
